final_prompt.prompt:
Create a Weibo news/hot-topic banner image for social media (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a documentary photojournalism aesthetic with smartphone-captured authenticity — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be wide panoramic banner with 16:9 aspect ratio, horizontal extension with ample negative space for text placement
Subject: must include city skyline at dusk with neon lights beginning to glow, pedestrians in motion, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset afterglow
Scene/backdrop: must be urban dusk cityscape with dramatic light-shadow contrast, strong sense of real on-site presence
Lighting/mood: needs dramatic chiaroscuro lighting with sunset reflections and emerging neon — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs twilight urban tones balancing warm sunset hues with cool neon accents — exact values are yours
Materials/textures: needs 8K-quality sharp detail with photorealistic surface treatment — exact grain and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, bold/heiti or modern font, prominent position), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary, smaller), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or bottom-right corner)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 16:9 wide banner format; must maintain professional editorial quality suitable for viral Weibo post
Avoid:
